mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_010302-02#Sql001 */ NVL(A.BRAND_CD,'') BRAND_CD, ( SELECT I.BRAND_NAME FROM ETINTRA.STAR_BRAND_MASTER I WHERE I.PRODUCT_CLASSIFY = 'K' AND I.DOMESTIC_FOREIGN_CLASSIFY = '0' AND I.COMPANY_CD = LPAD(SUBSTR(A.BRAND_CD,1,4),5,'0') AND I.RIGHT_CLASSIFY = ' ' AND I.NEW_OLD_CLASSIFY = NVL(SUBSTR(A.BRAND_CD,5),' ') ) BRAND_NAME, NVL(A.UNIT_AMOUNT,0) UNIT_AMOUNT, NVL(A.QUANTITY,0) QUANTITY, NVL(A.LOCK_AMOUNT,0) LOCK_AMOUNT, TO_CHAR(A.LOST_RIGHT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS LOST_RIGHT_DATE FROM CALLCENTER.TRUST_UNPAID_POSITION A WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerCode} AND A.LOCK_FLG = 1 ORDER BY 1 ASC
